description_long: This storage tank features a large, cylindrical central structure with a flat, circular roof and three rectangular extensions radiating outward at 120-degree angles. The main cylinder is clad in alternating sections of green-tinted glass panels and black-and-white checkerboard patterns, giving it a modern, industrial appearance. The rectangular extensions are solid, with two sides displaying the same checkerboard motif and the third side finished in a plain, light gray. The tank appears to be constructed primarily from reinforced concrete and glass, with the glass likely serving as observation or access panels. The roof is smooth and unadorned, with no visible access ladders, valves, or pipe attachments. The overall design suggests a contemporary storage facility, possibly for liquids or bulk materials, situated in an urban or industrial context.
description: A modern cylindrical storage tank with green glass panels, checkerboard patterns, and three rectangular extensions radiating outward. The structure combines industrial and contemporary design elements.
description_view_0: The front view highlights the green-tinted glass panels on the main cylinder and the plain gray surfaces of the rectangular extensions.
description_view_1: This view emphasizes the checkerboard pattern wrapping around the cylinder and the extensions, with minimal glass visible.
description_view_2: The checkerboard motif dominates the cylinder and one extension, while the other extensions appear plain and solid.
description_view_3: The view shows a mix of checkerboard and green glass panels on the cylinder, with the central extension facing forward.
